summary: Backend refactoring validation complete. All 29 pytest tests passed and 10 endpoint integration tests passed. Customer and Loyalty code successfully moved from server.py to routers/customers.py and routers/loyalty.py. All API endpoints working correctly.
passed_tests: AdminAuth: Admin login success with correct credentials
AdminAuth: Admin login rejected with invalid credentials (401)
AdminAuth: Admin token verification returns authenticated=true
StaffAuth: Staff login success with PIN 1234
StaffAuth: Staff login rejected with invalid PIN (401)
StaffAuth: Staff session verification returns valid=true, role=staff
CustomerRegistration: New customer registration returns token
CustomerRegistration: Duplicate email rejected with 400
CustomerRegistration: Invalid email format rejected with 422
CustomerLogin: Customer login success returns token and customer data
CustomerLogin: Wrong password rejected with 401
CustomerLogin: Non-existent email rejected with 401
CustomerProfile: GET /api/customers/me returns profile without password_hash
CustomerProfile: PUT /api/customers/me updates name and phone
CustomerProfile: GET /api/customers/me/orders returns order list
CustomerProfile: GET /api/customers/me/reservations returns reservation list
CustomerProfile: Unauthorized access rejected
CustomerLoyalty: GET /api/customers/me/loyalty returns QR code data and points
CustomerLoyalty: Unauthorized access rejected
LoyaltySettings: GET /api/loyalty/settings returns public settings (no auth)
LoyaltySettings: GET /api/loyalty/settings/admin returns full settings (admin)
LoyaltySettings: PUT /api/loyalty/settings updates settings (admin)
StaffLoyalty: POST /api/staff/loyalty/scan returns customer info from QR code
StaffLoyalty: Invalid QR code rejected with 400
StaffLoyalty: POST /api/staff/loyalty/add-points adds points to customer
StaffLoyalty: GET /api/staff/loyalty/search returns customer list
AdminCustomerManagement: GET /api/customers returns all customers (admin)
AdminCustomerManagement: GET /api/customers/{id} returns customer with orders/reservations
AdminCustomerManagement: Unauthorized customer list access rejected
Integration: Order creation with loyalty points - customer earned 15 points from €15.80 order
Integration: Order creation updates customer points_history and lifetime_points
critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - 320 lines of duplicate code removed from server.py
Customer/Loyalty code properly extracted to routers/customers.py and routers/loyalty.py
Shared utilities (db, auth functions, models) in routers/shared.py
All functions exported correctly via routers/__init__.py
Routers properly mounted with include_router() in server.py
API prefixes (/api) correctly applied through router definitions
Password hashing using bcrypt - secure implementation
JWT tokens with proper expiration (24h admin, 72h customer, 12h staff)
QR code data format: LEI-LOYALTY:{customer_id}:{checksum} - verified working
Points calculation: 1 point per Euro based on loyalty_settings.points_per_euro

success_rate.backend: 100% (29/29 pytest tests passed, 10/10 integration tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring verified. Customer/Loyalty APIs working correctly from routers package. Key endpoints tested: /api/customers/register, /api/customers/login, /api/customers/me, /api/customers/me/loyalty, /api/loyalty/settings, /api/staff/loyalty/scan, /api/staff/loyalty/add-points. Order creation with loyalty points integration verified - points are correctly calculated and added to customer account.
